title: Masterplast Heat Rub | Massaging Cream, for Muscular Aches, Pains and Discomfort, 70G

features: FAST RELIEF: Providing fast relief and comfort for mild to moderate pain. The Masterplast Heat Rub gives a cosy heat cream feel in seconds. Ideal after a long day on feet or when a stiff neck starts to nag.
MASSAGE IN RELIEF: This massaging cream melts in as it’s worked over tired areas. Use on calves after a run or on shoulders after hours at a desk for muscle pain relief.
SOOTHES MUSCLE ACHES: Menthol and eucalyptus deliver a fresh, soothing sensation alongside warming comfort. Perfect when a muscle ache flares after gardening or DIY.
EVERYDAY MUSCLE PAIN RELIEF: Handy for daily aches that pop up without warning. Reach for this heat cream after commuting, shopping, or carrying little ones around.
SORENESS: Keep this heat rub in the kit bag for post-workout recovery. A quick rub can help ease that next-day tightness after legs or back day.
NON-GREASY FEEL: The cream spreads smoothly and massages in without feeling sticky. Great when comfort is needed before relaxing on the sofa or heading to bed.
EASY DAILY ROUTINE: Massage into skin 1–2 times daily as needed for targeted comfort. Works well before a gentle stretch session or after a warm shower.
MUSCLE ACHE SUPPORT: Rub the massaging cream into the exact spot that’s bothering them for focused muscle pain relief. Brilliant for lower backs after housework or forearms after gym grips.
TENSION RELIEF: When shoulders creep up and tension builds, a little Heat Rub helps soothe the area. Use after laptop marathons or gaming sessions to unwind stiff muscles.
70G TUBE: The 70g Masterplast Heat Rub is compact and easy to store. Pop it in a gym bag or drawer for quick muscle pain relief whenever a muscle ache hits.
description: Product Description Masterplast Heat Rub Massaging Cream When muscles start complaining, Masterplast Heat Rub Massaging Cream steps in with a warming, soothing sensation that feels like instant comfort. This Heat Cream is made for everyday life, the post-gym tightness, the “why did I lift that?” back grumble, and the shoulder knots that build up after a screen-heavy day. Simply massage into the skin and let the Heat Rub warm muscles while the rich Massaging Cream helps work into the area with an easy glide. With menthol and eucalyptus oil, it delivers a fresh, calming feel alongside gentle heat, making it a handy option for Muscle Pain Relief when a Muscle Ache tries to steal the moment. Keep it on the bedside table for evenings, in the sports bag for recovery days, or in the bathroom for a quick rub after a shower. Directions: Massage into skin. Use 1–2 times daily as required. Warnings: For external use only. Avoid eyes and broken skin, discontinue use if irritation occurs, and keep out of reach of children. Not suitable during pregnancy or for children under 6. Store at room temperature away from direct sunlight and avoid contact with delicate clothing. Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Polysorbate 60, Sorbitan Stearate, Menthol, Eucalyptus Globulus oil, Methylparaben, Disodium Pyrophosphate, Disodium Phosphate, Butylated Hydroxyanisole, Methyl Salicylate. Directions 1. Apply the cream directly to the affected area for fast relief. 2. Use as often as required. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Use only as directed. For external use only. Do not apply to broke skin or near eyes. Discontinue use if irritation odccurs not suitable for use during pregnancy. Not suitable for children under 6 years old Avoid contact with delicate clothing. Contains Parabens, store at room temperature away from direct sunlight. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK.
